title: More Drinks
description: Ads More Drinks To Minecraft. like coffee, Crushed Ice.
body:
🍹 More Drinks Mod 🍹

Thirsty for something new in Minecraft? The More Drinks mod adds a refreshing variety of beverages to your world! From energizing coffee to cool crushed ice, this mod introduces a whole range of drinks to craft, collect, and enjoy.

✨ Features include:

Coffee – Brew it up for an energy boost!
Crushed Ice – Perfect for cooling off in the hot biomes.
New Drinks – More unique recipes to discover and craft.
Immersive Experience – Bring your Minecraft world to life with new items to enjoy.

Whether you’re building a cozy café, stocking your kitchen, or just want something new to sip after a long mining session, More Drinks adds the perfect flavor to your adventure.

🎥 Watch the showcase here:
